title: Polar.DB search benchmark: point lookup + category scan, 1M persons
description: Search benchmark with 1,000,000 person records. Measures primary-key point lookup for existing and missing keys, plus scan/filter by category. Indexed category lookup is optional and must be reported as unsupported if not implemented cleanly. Cache is intentionally not measured.

dataset.notes: Records contain id, name, age, category100, isPopular. category100 = id % 100. isPopular is reserved for future cache/popular experiments and is not cached here.

workload.notes: Measures existing GetByKey, missing GetByKey, and scan/filter category lookup. Cached and uncached metrics are not mixed.

fairness.notes: All targets use the same generated data, deterministic point keys, deterministic categories, and no cache.

runs.notes: Default search run profile. CLI may override for quick local runs.
